hero.title: Precision Engineered Hardware.
hero.subtitle: Stocking 500,000+ industrial components ready for same-day shipment. Certified ISO 9001:2015 supplier.

home.customMillingDesc: Can't find the exact part? Upload your CAD files for instant CNC milling quotes. We handle titanium, hardened steel, and aerospace-grade polymers with micron-level precision.
home.complianceCenterDesc: Download SDS sheets, ISO certifications, and conflict mineral reports instantly. All documentation meets latest global standards.

products.feature1Desc: Maintenance-free operation with 40% more runtime per charge compared to traditional brushed motors.
products.feature2Desc: Hardened steel components designed for high-stress drilling in structural steel and masonry.
products.feature3Desc: Dual LED system with 20-second delay ensures visibility in low-light industrial environments.
